calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Christopher Daley, Esq. for Petitioner: Marilyn Sara Robinson, also present, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male To Female.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee

Christopher W. Daley, Esq, for Petitioner: Marilyn Sara Robinson
